Package io.github.bbobbogi.stream4j.common

Interface PlatformChat

All Known Implementing Classes:
ChzzkChat, CiMeChat, SOOPChat, ToonationChat, YouTubeChat
public interface PlatformChat
Common interface for platform-specific chat clients.

Chat implementations for Chzzk, CiMe, SOOP, and YouTube expose these lifecycle operations.

Since:
1.0.0

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    close()
    Closes synchronously.
    CompletableFuture<Void>
    closeAsync()
    Closes asynchronously.
    void
    connect()
    Connects synchronously.
    CompletableFuture<Void>
    connectAsync()
    Connects asynchronously.
    boolean
    isConnected()
    Returns whether this chat client is currently connected.
    void
    reconnect()
    Reconnects synchronously.
    CompletableFuture<Void>
    reconnectAsync()
    Reconnects asynchronously.

  • Method Details

    • isConnected

      boolean isConnected()
      Returns whether this chat client is currently connected.
      Returns:
      true if connected

    • connectAsync

      CompletableFuture<Void> connectAsync()
      Connects asynchronously.
      Returns:
      a future that completes when connection is established

    • connect

      void connect()
      Connects synchronously.

    • closeAsync

      CompletableFuture<Void> closeAsync()
      Closes asynchronously.
      Returns:
      a future that completes when close is finished

    • close

      void close()
      Closes synchronously.

    • reconnectAsync

      CompletableFuture<Void> reconnectAsync()
      Reconnects asynchronously.
      Returns:
      a future that completes when reconnect is finished

    • reconnect

      void reconnect()
      Reconnects synchronously.
